moveToPickup.title: Move to Pickup ?
moveToPickup.decs_1: Are you sure you want to move to pickup for trip ID

startTrip.title: Start the trip?
startTrip.decs: Please do not start the trip until all passengers have boarded.

endTrip.title: End the trip?
endTrip.desc: Please make sure all passengers have arrived before ending the trip.

theTripHasStarted.title: The trip has started.
theTripHasStarted.desc: You can monitor the trip or chat with the passenger through the system

noTrips.title: No trips available at the moment
noTrips.desc: You can browse the available trips and choose the one that suits you from the list.

noNewRequest.title: No trips available at the moment
noNewRequest.desc: You will be notified as soon as a new trip is assigned to you!

adminVerification.title: Account Under Review
adminVerification.desc: Your driver account is being reviewed by our admin team

documentUpload.title: Upload Required Documents
documentUpload.subtitle: Please provide clear photos or scans of each document below. These are needed to verify your eligibility as a private hire driver.

section.title: Upload your compliance documents
section.description: Upload clear photos or scans for each required document. These are needed to verify your eligibility as a private hire driver.

pcoLicence.label: PCO driver licence issued by TfL (mandatory)
pcoLicence.description: Upload the front of your TfL private hire driver licence showing your name, badge number, expiry date, and photo.

dbsCertificate.label: DBS enhanced certificate (background check)
dbsCertificate.description: Provide a recent Disclosure and Barring Service certificate (issued within the last 6 months).

dvlaLicence.label: UK DVLA driving licence (both sides)
dvlaLicence.description: Upload a clear photo of the front and back of your UK driving licence, showing all details.

phvLicence.label: Vehicle PHV licence (if you own the vehicle)
phvLicence.description: Upload the Transport for London PHV licence for the vehicle you’ll be using. If you rent, ask the operator for this document.

vehicleInsurance.label: Private hire vehicle insurance certificate
vehicleInsurance.description: Provide proof that the vehicle is insured for private hire work (hire & reward cover).

motCertificate.label: MOT certificate (vehicle less than 6 months old exempt)
motCertificate.description: Upload the latest MOT certificate for the vehicle.
